name: D.L. Hughley
bio: Darryl Lynn Hughley is an American stand-up comedian and actor who became the original host of BETs ComicView from 1992 to 1993 and one of the Big Four in The Original Kings of Comedy. He created and starred in the sitcom The Hughleys, hosted Comedy Centrals Weekends at the D.L., and fronted CNNs D.L. Hughley Breaks the News. Known for socially and politically pointed material, he has also written several books and works as a radio host.

timeline.ev: Becomes original host of BETs ComicView
Creates and stars in The Hughleys
Featured in The Original Kings of Comedy
Hosts CNNs D.L. Hughley Breaks the News
Competes on Dancing with the Stars

accolades: One of The Original Kings of Comedy (2000)
